creator: jaroslav.stepan@muzabreh.cz
text:
Can not compile php5-curl. It ends with the following error:

/var/ports/usr/ports/ftp/php5-curl/work/php-5.3.2/ext/curl/interface.c:319: warning: initialization discards qualifiers from pointer target type
/var/ports/usr/ports/ftp/php5-curl/work/php-5.3.2/ext/curl/interface.c: In function 'curl_write':
/var/ports/usr/ports/ftp/php5-curl/work/php-5.3.2/ext/curl/interface.c:930: error: 'zend_fcall_info' has no member named 'object_ptr'
/var/ports/usr/ports/ftp/php5-curl/work/php-5.3.2/ext/curl/interface.c: In function 'curl_progress':
/var/ports/usr/ports/ftp/php5-curl/work/php-5.3.2/ext/curl/interface.c:1006: error: 'zend_fcall_info' has no member named 'object_ptr'
/var/ports/usr/ports/ftp/php5-curl/work/php-5.3.2/ext/curl/interface.c: In function 'curl_read':
/var/ports/usr/ports/ftp/php5-curl/work/php-5.3.2/ext/curl/interface.c:1080: error: 'zend_fcall_info' has no member named 'object_ptr'
/var/ports/usr/ports/ftp/php5-curl/work/php-5.3.2/ext/curl/interface.c: In function 'curl_write_header':
/var/ports/usr/ports/ftp/php5-curl/work/php-5.3.2/ext/curl/interface.c:1157: error: 'zend_fcall_info' has no member named 'object_ptr'
*** Error code 1
1 error
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/ftp/php5-curl.
